name: dw-marketing
description: Daniels & Washington marketing toolkit — law-firm marketing skills with attorney-advertising compliance built in. Currently ships the ge-youtube plugin (Great Elephant Law YouTube growth).

plugins.name: ge-youtube
plugins.description: Great Elephant Law YouTube growth toolkit — 12 chainable skills covering attorney-advertising compliance, channel audit, ideation, scripting, packaging, SEO, Shorts, publishing gate, community, and analytics. Built for subscriber + view growth with compliance baked into every step.

plugins.name: ge-video-pipeline
plugins.description: Daily HeyGen short-form video pipeline — content queue, scheduling, and approval workflow feeding YouTube and cross-post distribution.
